operator_notes.description: free-text run note; does not change commands or grading

cancellable._why: A deliberately long no-op, used ONLY to prove the cancellation path end-to-end on a live worker (Phase 5, 2026-07-23). The farm lane's cancel handling cannot be probed with fast/full — both finish in under a second, so a cancel marker can never race them. Expected outcome of a real cancel probe: verdict CANCELLED, status 'cancelled', exit_code null, well before the 6-minute timeout. If this profile ever PASSes, cancellation is BROKEN — it means the command ran to completion.
